name: Golf Tee Performance
about: GolfTee Performance is an indoor golf performance center offering golfers year-round training in a 4,500 sq ft facility located in Southlake, Texas. The venue is equipped with 6 hitting simulators featuring Foresight technology, a fitness area, and a 25'x15' ft chipping and putting green. GolfTee Performance offers memberships built for individual golfers, those with a coach, or families, and provides a range of instruction services including private lessons, junior programs, adult classes, golf fitness, corporate events, on-course lessons, and club fitting. The facility is also available for hosting various private events such as corporate gatherings, yoga classes, birthday parties, and wedding receptions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round training regardless of weather conditions
Six state-of-the-art Foresight simulators for realistic play
Integrated golf fitness programs for holistic improvement
Experienced instructor Neal Freeman with 20+ years of expertise
Competitive group atmosphere for junior development

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator technology used in all 6 bays

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The typical time for 18 holes on a simulator is approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfTee Performance offers junior golf development programs and has a competitive group atmosphere specifically for young golfers.
